So bit 28 in PPC numbering corresponds to bit 3 from the least significant bit, meaning the function is setting bit 3 of the flags byte at offset 0x10. In PPC's bitfield notation where b0 is the MSB (0x80), this 0x08 value maps to b4, so I'm trying to figure out which flag in the struct this actually represents.
